steps.title: Identify the growth multiplier
steps.content: A $7\%$ annual increase means one year after the starting point the population is $\left(4000\right)(1.07)=4280$. Use the values at $x=0$ and $x=1$ directly.

steps.title: Build the exponential formula
steps.content: The initial population is $4000$, so the starting factor is $4000$. The annual multiplier is $1.07$, so after $x$ years the model is $$p=4000(1.07)^x.$$ This matches the correct answer, D.
